instruction: The lines of this icon look too thin. Fix the stroke-width.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="folder" data-source="heroicons/outline/folder.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="0.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M2.25 12.75V12A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 4.5 9.75h15A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 21.75 12v.75m-8.69-6.44-2.12-2.12a1.5 1.5 0 0 0-1.061-.44H4.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 6v12a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 2.25h15A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 21.75 18V9a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25h-5.379a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.06-.44Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
